title: Vulkan Border Fix
description: Fixes a bug where the world border is invisible when using Vulkan Mod!
body:
Vulkan Border Fix:

• VulkanMod introduces a brand new rendering engine to Minecraft in order to bring performance and graphical improvements, but it suffers from a visual bug that is a bit unknown: the world border becomes completely invisible.

Why this happens:

• Minecraft's vanilla world border height is **mathematically infinite**. When running VulkanMod, this infinite vertex data is not handled correctly by Vulkan, causing the engine to make the border disappear.

Solution:

• **This mod fixes the issue by capping the world border at a finite height, allowing VulkanMod to correctly process and render the vertex data**.

Features:

• Brings back the vanilla world border while running VulkanMod.

• Allows you to customize the world border's height.
